message:
feat(ext): add structured logging + unit tests for extension wiring (bd-2i5)

- Add tracing events for extension tool/command/shortcut execution (start/end with timing)
- Add tracing events for extension event dispatch (start/end with timing)
- Add 9 unit tests: parse_extension_command parsing + extension_commands_for_catalog
- Fix clippy assertion warning in extensions_js test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
